title: Walmart-owned Flipkart, Amazon are squeezing India’s quick commerce startups
description: Flipkart's ongoing expansion beyond major cities and heavy discounting is raising risks for India's quick commerce startups, analysts say.

title: ChatGPT for marketing teams
description: Learn how marketing teams use ChatGPT to plan campaigns, generate content, analyze performance, and move from ideas to execution faster.

title: Why Pfizer and other blue-chip brands are building internal AI search hubs to reclaim control
description: As AI upends traditional rankings, big spenders like Pfizer and other blue-chip brands are building internal task forces.

title: OpenAI has quietly launched its ads manager as it races to build out its ads business
description: The AI platform quietly launched its ads manager within its ChatGPT ads pilot advertisers last week, and also lowered the barrier to joining the test.

title: Using projects in ChatGPT
description: Learn how to use orojects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively.

title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
description: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.

title: Using custom GPTs
description: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants.

title: Analyzing data with ChatGPT
description: Learn how to analyze data with ChatGPT by exploring datasets, generating insights, creating visualizations, and turning findings into actionable decisions.

title: Anthropic’s Glasswing Highlights AI’s Security Paradox
description: A new initiative arrives amid growing concerns about AI’s ability to identify vulnerabilities, pointing to a broader shift toward AI-driven security.

title: Intel Secures New AI Infrastructure Deal With Google
description: The agreement is one of many AI infrastructure deals among major tech vendors over the last few months.

title: South Korean Chipmaker Partners with SKT, Arm for Sovereign AI
description: Rebellions said it will work with the companies to boost AI and telecom data centers, as it pushes its market expansion.

title: Should You Give Your AI Agent a Human Name?
description: Our guide to the pros and cons of naming agents, and tips for how to do it.

title: Creating Pathways into AI for People with Disabilities
description: Salesforce launches a new AI training program with the Center for Independent Living to expand access to AI skills and create inclusive pathways into the AI economy for people with disabilities.

title: The Real AI Race Isn't About Models or Data. It's About Context.
description: Every company I talk to right now is convinced they have an AI problem.

title: Svedka addresses Gen Z’s digital burnout with Y2K-inspired flip phone
description: The Svedphone includes only two features — the ability to call and text — and follows the brand’s poorly received AI-generated Super Bowl ad.
